summary:
Antonycc claims there were four pushes to the main branch of the repository polycode-public/6-kyu-understand-roman-numerals. The first, commit 53d5c859 by intention-benchmark on 2026-06-15, involved "benchmark reset: clean baseline (6-kyu-understand-roman-numerals)" and affected several files. The second, commit c60c6e6e by github-actions[bot] on the same day, involved "feat: deliver intent (deliver-intent) (#7)" and affected src/lib/main.js and tests/unit/main.test.js. The third, commit 3324cc7e by Antony Cartwright on 2026-06-16, involved "showcase: src/web exercises the delivered API (distinct screenshot) + demo() + test.yml gate." antonycc (trust: unknown) claims: Visitor [push to main]. Commit 38fce22e by github-actions[bot] on June 14, 2026, touches README.md, src/lib/main.js, tests/unit/main.test.js, and tests/unit/fizzbuzz.test.js. This commit delivers intent (deliver-intent) and fixes issue #5. Additionally, issue #5 "Deliver the INTENT" is closed. The issue, ticket #5, required implementing the mission in src/lib/main.js with unit tests and a README, as outlined in INTENT.md. If the task was too large for one pass, the most coherent self-contained slice should be delivered with an explanation in the PR. Pull request #6 "feat: deliver intent (deliver-intent)" merged (agentic-lib/deliver-intent-5 into main) on repository polycode-public/6-kyu-understand-roman-numerals. Pull request #6 fixes issue #5. Commit e0c1590b by antonycc on June 14, 2026, touches.github/workflows/on-screenshot.yml with the message "Add on-screenshot: publish SCREENSHOT_INDEX.png for the showcase". Commit f03fd65a by Antony Cartwright on June 14, 2026, changes the Dependabot update interval from weekly to monthly and touches .github/dependabot.yml. Additionally, antonycc claims that Pull request #7 "feat: deliver intent (deliver-intent)" merged (agentic-lib/deliver-intent-INTENT.md into main) on repository polycode-public/6-kyu-understand-roman-numerals via Antonycc (trust: unknown) claims: Visitor: PR #6 merged, adding "deliver intent (deliver-intent)" to the main branch of repository polycode-public/6-kyu-understand-roman-numerals, closing issue #5. PR #6 includes the implementation in src/lib/main.js with unit tests and a README, as per INTENT.md, and is part of an automated one-shot delivery via the agentic-lib transform engine. This update includes bug fixes such as disabling client cdp API under certain conditions and removing orphaned Playwright routes.
